title: My Wealth Belongs to Me
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that significant wealth will make you a target or change who you are
excerpt: A short energy statement for the fear that wealth draws judgement or corrupts. The release names the ceiling belief; the allow names a financial life in which having more is held without apology and without loss of self.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when financial growth triggers the fear of judgement, of being seen differently, or of becoming someone whose character is open to question.

content.text: An energy statement for the ceiling that keeps money at a safe, uncontroversial level. The release names the belief that having more will change you or give others grounds to judge; the allow names the alternative: a financial life where significant wealth is held without apology or loss of self.

I am ready to release the belief that having significant wealth will make me a target, change who I am at the core, or give others legitimate grounds to judge my character. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow a financial life in which I hold significant wealth without apology — where the money is mine, my values hold, and having more is not something I need to defend or diminish. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
